arts.ttl: Team News: Real Valladolid vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash between Real Valladolid and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid reject chance to sign Man City star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid recently rejected the opportunity to bring in Kyle Walker from Manchester City. That’s according to Marca, who have on Friday provided an insight into the…

arts.ttl: Stats reveal how many VAR decisions go against Real Madrid and Barcelona in LaLiga
arts.sum: Real Madrid are the team that has had the most goals disallowed by VAR in the Spanish top flight - far exceeding the figure for Barcelona ( 13 ) and far behind those next on the list, Atlético, Celta and Sevilla, with 17 goals disallowed respectively. Club Goals disallowed by VAR Real Madrid 32 Atletico Madrid 17 Celta 17 Sevilla 17 Villarreal 16 Real Sociedad 15 Valencia 14 Barcelona 13 Espanyol 13

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran considers Al-Nassr move as Real Madrid enter race to sign Aston Villa striker
arts.sum: The race to sign Aston Villa centre-forward Jhon Duran (21) is heating up as Real Madrid have joined PSG and Saudi Pro League Al-Nassr in the running to sign the…

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Barcelona & Real Madrid target gives verdict on January transfer
arts.sum: Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras has insisted he remains happy with the Portuguese side amid interest in his services from Manchester United, Barcelona and Real Madrid. Carreras, 21, joined Benfica this summer when his loan from United, where he was better known as Alvaro Fernandez, was made permanent for £5m, and his impressive performances have seen his transfer value grow rapidly over the past six months.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal and Tottenham target likened to Eduardo Camavinga available for as little as £5m
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur have both been linked with a host of players as they look to get their mixed seasons back on track. Neither...

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti speaks out on Real Madrid line-up plans vs Real Valladolid
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an insight into his plans for the club’s XI this weekend. Real, of course, are primed to return to action tomorrow evening.…

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal battle Real Madrid for Valencia’s Yarek Gasiorowski
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal battle Real Madrid for Valencia’s Yarek Gasiorowski Arsenal and Real Madrid are both keeping close tabs on Valencia’s highly rated centre-back Yarek Gasiorowski, with the Spain U19 international attracting widespread attention across Europe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'in contact' with 29-year-old Bundesliga star
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly in talks with Bayern Munich and Germany midfielder Joshua Kimmich over a potential transfer to the Bernabeu in 2025.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid publish 21-man squad with four changes to face Real Valladolid in La Liga action
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to travel 130 miles Northwest tomorrow evening to take on La Liga newcomers Real Valladolid at 8pm at the Estadio Municipal José Zorilla. Carlo Ancelotti published…
